detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	114學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 資訊科技英文導論 (English for Information Technology)	開課班級 : 資工一	學　　分 : 3.0	授課時數 : 3.0
授課教師 : 李錫捷	必選修 : 必修	 	 


1.教學目標
You’ll build the language skills you need through short, engaging video lessons, hands-on vocabulary and grammar practice, and interactive reading and listening activities. Each course focuses on practical English—so you’ll be ready to collaborate with your team, manage tasks, offer advice, and take part in online tech communities. By the end, you’ll be better equipped to share ideas, solve problems, and succeed in international IT environments. 


2.教學綱要
Practice English in real-world IT scenarios, including cybersecurity, software development, AI prompting, data analysis, DevOps, quality assurance, machine learning, project management, tech support, UX/UI, community management, and game design.

English for IT: Describing and Comparing
English for IT: Advice and Time
English for IT: Needs and Responsibilities
English for IT: People and Quantities
